extensionName.description: Extension name shown in the browser toolbar and store

extensionDescription.message: Gmail에서 인증 코드를 가져와 양식에 입력합니다. 모든 처리는 기기에서만 이루어집니다.

connectionStatusConnected.message: Connected to Gmail. Open the page with your verification form, then press the button below.

connectionStatusDisconnected.message: Connect to Gmail to extract verification codes and fill them into forms.

howItWorks1.message: Q-Fill instantly retrieves verification codes from your inbox and fills them into web forms with one click.

howItWorks2.message: Open the site that asks for a code, then run Check Emails from this popup.

howItWorks3.message: Only verification codes are read locally. Nothing is sent to external servers.

noEmailsUser.message: No emails found in your inbox

noCodeUser.message: No verification code found in your recent emails

codeAppliedUser.message: Verification code applied to the page behind this popup.

fillFailedDefault.message: Code found but could not fill the form. Open the verification page and try again.

errorNotConnected.message: Connect to Gmail before checking for codes.

errorTimeout.message: Checking took too long. Please try again.

notificationNoCode.message: No verification code in your recent emails.

toastFillFailedPage.message: Could not fill verification code on this page
